analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒受到多個因素影響，包括中國DeepSeek事件、美聯儲利率預測和科技股的下跌。NVIDIA 股價下跌16%，AI基礎設施股大幅下跌。倫敦金、銀價格下跌。市場論壇中提及DeepSeek、SoFi等公司，涉及科技、媒體和電信領域的市場動態。聯邦儲備理事會將於6月17日宣布利率決策，影響全球金融市場。

【結語】
散戶投資人應該保持冷靜和謹慎，避免因恐慌情緒而做出錯誤的投資決定。投資人應該根據自己的財務狀況和風險承受能力進行投資，並且應該保持長期的投資觀點。投資人也應該保持多元化的投資組合，避免過度集中在某一股或某一領域。

【精選個股】
NVDA - NVIDIA - NVIDIA 以62.97%的淨利率入選2026年最有利可圖的美國股票之一。
JPM - 摩根大通 - 摩根大通 (JPM) 股價因擴展 Chase 數位銀行到至少五個歐洲市場而受到關注。
INTC - 英特爾 - 克拉默稱英特爾是他今年的首選股，認為投資者應該關注公司未來的AI機會。

風險提醒：投資股票涉及風險，投資人應該謹慎評估自己的財務狀況和風險承受能力，並且應該保持長期的投資觀點。

items.title: NETLIST EXPANDS LEGAL ACTION AGAINST SAMSUNG AND GOOGLE FOR INFRINGEMENT OF NEW AI MEMORY PATENTS
items.summary: Netlist, Inc. (OTCBQ: NLST) today announced it has initiated new legal proceedings against Samsung in the U.S. International Trade Commission (ITC) and the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Texas. These actions are based on the infringement of Netlist's U.S. Patent Nos. 12,646,537 and 12,650,937, which respectively read on Samsung's high-bandwidth memory (HBM) products and Samsung's DDR5 RDIMMs and MRDIMMs. The new ITC complaint names Google, Supermicro, Nvidia and Broadcom as addi
items.zh_title: Netlist 對 Samsung 和 Google 提起新訴訟，指控侵犯新 AI 記憶體專利
items.zh_point: Netlist 對 Samsung 和 Google 提起訴訟，指控侵犯其新 AI 記憶體專利，涉及高頻寬記憶體 (HBM) 產品和 DDR5 RDIMMs 和 MRDIMMs 等。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Stock Could Be 23% Below Fair Value After Europe Digital Bank Push
items.summary: Interest in JPMorgan Chase (JPM) stock has picked up after management outlined plans to expand the Chase digital bank into at least five European markets, including France, Spain and Italy, over five years. See our latest analysis for JPMorgan Chase. The Chase digital expansion headlines arrive during a period of firm momentum for JPMorgan Chase, with a 7-day share price return of 7.87% and a 30-day share price return of 10.88%, while the 1-year total shareholder return of 24.09% and 5-year...
items.zh_title: 摩根大通 (JPM) 股票可能低於合理價值 23%
items.zh_point: 摩根大通 (JPM) 股價因擴展 Chase 數位銀行到至少五個歐洲市場而受到關注，包括法國、西班牙和義大利。該公司股價近期表現良好，7 天內漲幅達 7.87%，30 天內漲幅達 10.88%，一年內股東回報達 24.09%。

items.title: NVIDIA (NVDA) – Among the 12 Most Profitable American Stocks to Buy in 2026
items.summary: With a net profit margin of 62.97%, NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is included among the 12 Most Profitable American Stocks to Buy in 2026. A pioneer in accelerated computing, NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is a full-stack computing company with data-center-scale offerings that are reshaping the industry. NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) announced on June 15 that it is looking to […]
items.zh_title: NVIDIA (NVDA) – 2026年最有利可圖的美國股票之一
items.zh_point: NVIDIA公司以62.97%的淨利率入選2026年最有利可圖的美國股票之一，該公司以加速計算領域的先驅地位，提供全堆疊計算服務，為業界帶來革新。

items.title: Coherent's Good News Gets A Cold Shoulder
items.summary: The company announced a government-backed expansion for its AI business, and investors promptly headed for the exits.
items.zh_title: Coherent 的好消息被冷落
items.zh_point: Coherent 公佈政府支持的 AI 业务擴張計畫，但投資人卻迅速撤資。

items.title: SpaceX Sank Today -- Is the Stock a Buy Right Now?
items.summary: SpaceX just had its first daily valuation pullback as a public company. Is now the time to buy?
items.zh_title: SpaceX 股價今天下跌 -- 是現在買入時機嗎？
items.zh_point: SpaceX 首次作為上市公司出現日線下跌，是否現在是買入的好時機？

items.title: Inside India newsletter: Anthropic curbs ignite AI debate in India — efforts 'too slow, way too small'
items.summary: India's ambitions of becoming a global AI innovation powerhouse by building applications on top of foreign foundational models are being challenged.
items.zh_title: 印度內幕新聞：Anthropic限制引發印度AI辯論 — 努力「太慢，太小」
items.zh_point: 印度打算成為全球AI創新中心，但仍面臨挑戰，因為印度企業試圖在外國基礎模型上建立應用程式的努力被質疑太慢且規模太小。

items.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: Stocks fell on Wednesday after the Federal Reserve's so-called "dot plot" suggested that an interest rate hike could be in the cards for 2026.
items.zh_title: 週四大股市新聞：明日市場可能受哪些因素影響
items.zh_point: 美聯儲的「點陣圖」（dot plot）預測，2026年可能會有利率上調，股市因此於週三下跌。

items.title: Here are the five big takeaways from Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chairman
items.summary: The Federal Reserve and Chairman Kevin Warsh on Wednesday followed the script on interest rates closely.
items.zh_title: 華爾街對凱文華許的首次聯邦儲備會議有何看法
items.zh_point: 聯邦儲備會議和凱文華許主席於星期三緊密遵循利率政策。

items.title: CME CEO Terrence Duffy says the exchange operator will sue CFTC over perpetual futures
items.summary: Outgoing CME CEO Terrence Duffy said that the exchange operator will sue the CFTC over the agency’s decision to approve perpetual futures.
items.zh_title: CME CEO Terrence Duffy 表示交易所將對 CFTC 追究永久期貨決策
items.zh_point: CME CEO Terrence Duffy 表示交易所將對 CFTC 提起訴訟，抗議該機構批准永久期貨交易。

items.title: Jim Cramer says this chipmaker is still a buy after soaring more than 200% this year
items.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer named Intel as his top stock pick, arguing that investors should focus on the company's future AI opportunities.
items.zh_title: 克拉默稱這家晶片製造商仍是買入股東的選擇，儘管今年已上漲超過200%
items.zh_point: CNBC的克拉默稱英特爾是他今年的首選股，認為投資者應該關注公司未來的AI機會。

items.title: Scared to spend your retirement money? Here’s one way to get over the fear of running out.
items.summary: This fear is probably going to cause you some regrets.
items.zh_title: 害怕花光退休金？這樣可以幫你克服恐懼
items.zh_point: 害怕花光退休金可能會讓你在未來感到後悔。研究表明，許多人在退休後會因為恐懼而錯過享受生活的機會。為了克服這種恐懼，你可以試著建立一個可靠的退休金計畫，確保你的金錢能夠持續供應你所需的生活費用。

items.title: I inherited a $500,000 IRA. Can I reduce the tax burden by using it for my children’s education?
items.summary: “I would like to use my share to help fund college for my three children.”
items.zh_title: 我繼承了 50 萬美元的退休金計畫，如何減少稅負？
items.zh_point: 一位父親想用繼承的退休金計畫資助三個孩子的大學教育，減少稅負。

items.title: Rumble gets 22,000 Nvidia chips, but the video company’s CEO insists this isn’t a fad-like pivot
items.summary: Is Rumble’s AI expansion just Allbirds 2.0 — or a move modeled after Elon Musk?
items.zh_title: Rumble 得到 22,000 Nvidia 芯片，但該視頻公司 CEO堅持這不是一時之交
items.zh_point: Rumble 進軍 AI 領域，是否是一個短暫的轉變，還是像 Elon Musk 那樣的重大轉變？該公司的 CEO 表示，這是公司未來發展的重要一步，但是否能夠持續下去，還有待觀察。

items.title: ‘I’m a realist’: I’m 50 with $6.5 million saved. Should I quit my $200,000 job and retire early?
items.summary: “I have been considering leaving my job so that I can focus on my trading activities full time.”
items.zh_title: 50歲，儲蓄6,500萬，該退休還是繼續工作？
items.zh_point: 一位50歲的投資者儲蓄了6,500萬美金，正在考慮辭去200,000美元的工作，專心從事交易活動。

items.title: My mother was co-owner of my late grandmother’s bank account. Should she share the money with her siblings?
items.summary: “The will stated that the estate was to be divided equally among her children.”
items.zh_title: 母親與我祖母共同持有銀行帳戶，應該與她哥哥姐姐分享遺產？
items.zh_point: 我母親與我祖母共同持有銀行帳戶，遺囑規定遺產應該均等分配給她孩子們。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，科技股領跌，Nvidia 下跌16%，AI基礎設施股大幅下跌。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 倫敦金、銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 倫敦金價格下跌1.4%，連續兩個交易日下跌，倫敦銀價格下跌2.5%，連續三個交易日下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵要點
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，無需使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信概要：市場論壇
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi等公司在最新的市場論壇中被提及，涉及科技、媒體和電信領域的市場動態。

items.title: AIEQ: Sophisticated AI-Driven Strategy That Underperforms
items.zh_title: AIEQ：高級人工智慧驅動策略表現不佳
items.zh_point: AIEQ是一種依靠人工智慧的投資策略，但其實際表現不如預期，可能與其複雜性或投資決策過程中的誤差有關。

items.title: Norsk Hydro to shut two U.S. metal extrusion plants, cutting 350 jobs
